name: microsoft-365-user-profile-mcp-frontier
title: Work IQ User
summary: Work IQ MCP server for Microsoft 365 User operations. Learn more at https://aka.ms/AboutWorkIQ
description: Work IQ User MCP Server which enables Microsoft 365 user profile and directory lookups (user details, managers, direct reports, and org listings). This feature is in preview and is part of the Work IQ tools, providing shared work intelligence and actions for agents. Availability and capabilities are subject to change. Learn more: https://aka.ms/AboutWorkIQ

useCases.name: Retrieve signed-in user profile
useCases.description: Return profile fields (displayName, email, id, jobTitle, officeLocation, mobilePhone) for the authenticated user.

useCases.name: Manager and direct reports
useCases.description: Get a user's manager and list direct reports to support org-chart lookups and workflow routing.

useCases.name: Lookup other users
useCases.description: Query profile details for other users by UPN, id, or display name for directory-driven scenarios.

useCases.name: Organization information
useCases.description: Retrieve basic tenant/organization metadata useful for admin or tenant-aware agents.

useCases.name: List directory users
useCases.description: Enumerate users in the directory with optional filters/paging for synchronization or bulk lookup tasks.

a365userprofileoauth2.description: Authenticate with Work IQ using OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support.
